name: MHTOCContraceptiveMedicationOCP
title: MH TOC Medication ValueSet for Oral Contraceptive Pills (OCPs)
description: A ValueSet comprised of RxNorm condition codes for oral contraceptive pills (OCPs). The codes in the ValueSet should be monitored for changes as they may be updated in the future.
